description: LLM Routing — gateway proxies /v1/messages to an LLM backend (Anthropic API format). Weight=0.00 in observation mode; scored but does not affect composite.

tasks.name: Basic message completion
tasks.notes: Baseline: simple prompt, expect valid Anthropic API response with usage stats.

tasks.name: Long prompt (stress test)

messages.content: This is a longer benchmark prompt designed to test gateway handling of larger payloads. The gateway should proxy the full request to the upstream LLM without truncation. Please generate a detailed response covering: 1) proxy overhead, 2) header forwarding, 3) body integrity, 4) timeout handling, 5) error propagation. This tests the gateway's ability to handle non-trivial request sizes.

tasks.notes: Longer payload — tests that gateway doesn't truncate or timeout on larger prompts.

tasks.name: System message included

body.system: You are a benchmark test assistant. Respond with exactly: OK

tasks.notes: System message in request body — gateway should forward without modification.

tasks.name: Invalid model name
tasks.notes: Invalid model — gateway should proxy error from upstream (400/404) or mock returns 200. Never 500.

tasks.name: Concurrent LLM requests
tasks.notes: 3 VUs × 10 iterations — tests LLM proxy throughput and connection pooling.
